# Index usability commands keep machine output clean in a real process.
exec pinax init vault --title Vault --json
stdout '"command":"vault.init"'
exec pinax note new Alpha --body 'alpha body' --slug alpha --vault vault --json
stdout '"command":"note.new"'
-- vault/notes/raw.md --
# Raw Markdown

raw-only marker

rm vault/.pinax/index.sqlite

exec pinax index --vault vault --agent
! stderr .
stdout 'command=index.summary'
stdout 'fact.index_status=missing'
stdout 'action.refresh='
! stdout '状态'
! stdout '本地索引'

exec pinax index doctor --vault vault --json
! stderr .
stdout '"command":"index.doctor"'
stdout '"issue_codes":"index_missing"'
stdout 'pinax index refresh --vault'
! stdout 'SLOW SQL'
! stdout 'delete .pinax/index.sqlite'

exec pinax index refresh --vault vault --json
! stderr .
stdout '"command":"index.refresh"'
stdout '"index_status":"fresh"'
stdout '"failed":"0"'

exec pinax search raw-only --vault vault --json
! stderr .
stdout '"returned":"0"'

-- corrupt-index --
not sqlite
cp corrupt-index vault/.pinax/index.sqlite

exec pinax index repair --vault vault --kind recreate --dry-run --events
! stderr .
stdout '"type":"start"'
stdout '"type":"end"'
stdout '"command":"index.repair"'
! stdout '状态'

exec pinax index repair --vault vault --kind recreate --yes --json
! stderr .
stdout '"command":"index.repair"'
stdout '"index_status":"fresh"'
stdout '.pinax/index-backups/'

exec pinax index doctor --vault vault --json
! stderr .
stdout '"command":"index.doctor"'
stdout '"status":"success"'
stdout '"index_status":"fresh"'
